questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "complex"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "information"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "essential"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "additional"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "identify"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "noun"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "pronoun"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "combine"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "refer"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "person"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "place"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "thing"?
Choose the best word: A relative clause follows a _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "A relative clause follows a noun." — từ đúng là "noun" (danh từ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Who is a relative _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Who is a relative pronoun." — từ đúng là "pronoun" (đại từ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We _____ two sentences into one.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We combine two sentences into one." — từ đúng là "combine" (kết hợp).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Which _____s to things.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Which refers to things." — từ đúng là "refer" (ám chỉ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Who refers to a _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Who refers to a person." — từ đúng là "person" (người).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Where refers to a _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Where refers to a place." — từ đúng là "place" (nơi chốn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Which refers to a _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Which refers to a thing." — từ đúng là "thing" (vật).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We can _____ that in some cases.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We can omit that in some cases." — từ đúng là "omit" (lược bỏ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Non-defining clauses use _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Non-defining clauses use commas." — từ đúng là "comma" (dấu phẩy).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The clause specifies the object. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The clause specifies the object." — từ đúng là "specify" (chỉ rõ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The clause modifies the noun. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The clause modifies the noun." — từ đúng là "modify" (bổ nghĩa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Build one complex _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Build one complex sentence." — từ đúng là "sentence" (câu).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The man ___ called is my uncle.
Complete the sentence: The book ___ I read was good.
Complete the sentence: This is the house ___ I was born.
Complete the sentence: The boy ___ dog is lost is crying.
Complete the sentence: The car ___ he bought is red.
Complete the sentence: The woman ___ I met is a doctor.
questions.explanation: 'Whom' is the object pronoun for people.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The city ___ we visited was lovely.
questions.explanation: 'Which' refers to a thing/place as object.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: People ___ exercise are healthier.
Complete the sentence: The shop ___ sells books is closed.
questions.explanation: 'Which' refers to a thing as subject.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The day ___ we met was sunny.
Which English word means "phức tạp"?
Which English word means "thông tin"?
Which English word means "thiết yếu"?
Which English word means "thêm vào"?
Which English word means "nhận diện"?
Which English word means "danh từ"?
